creator: rolf.grossmann@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I'm running into the same issue after getting ready to use pkgng with
the upcoming 9.1 release.

I've looked at PR 167700
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/167700> like you
suggested and I can't find a proper patch and the full port replacements
have so many changes, I can't tell what's what. On the other hand, the
patch suggested here is simple, and I can confirm it works for getting
the port compatible with pkgng. It also makes bacula-client required by
bacula-server like you're saying.

So I would appreciate if we could get this patch in right now to be able
to use bacula with pkgng and sort out the other issues you're looking
for whenever you find the time to work through them.

Best regards,
Rolf Grossmann.
